title: Capability Token Wire Format (JWS Compact Serialization)
description: Wire format for capability tokens using JWS Compact Serialization per ADR-0003 (PROPOSED). alg MUST be ES256; alg=none is FORBIDDEN. The token is a three-part dot-separated string: protected_header.payload.signature.

alg.description: ECDSA P-256 / SHA-256. alg=none is FORBIDDEN.

kid.description: Key identifier for verification key lookup

key_purpose.description: MUST be capability_token; MUST NOT be policy_bundle or sbom (SECURITY.md §8)

payload.description: Claims payload; MUST conform to capability-token-claims schema

signature.description: JWS signature value (BASE64URL-encoded). MUST NOT be empty. Signing input: ASCII(BASE64URL(protected_header)) + '.' + ASCII(BASE64URL(payload)) per RFC 7515. Payload canonicalization uses JCS (RFC 8785) before signing; verifier MUST verify original bytes, MUST NOT re-serialize.

description: JWS compact serialization container for capability tokens. Independent key_purpose=capability_token, distinct from policy_bundle/SBOM detached manifests. Canonicalization for token signing is JCS (RFC 8785), independent from envelope canonicalization (MACHINE_READABLE_CONTRACTS.md §6.5).
